{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Procurement Officer",
  "description": "Neveah Limited is a leading commodity trading company established in 2014, with its head office in Abuja and five operational offices across Nigeria. The company specializes in the export of solid minerals and agricultural products, sourcing the finest raw materials from local markets to meet international demand. Neveah has now expanded into manufacturing, focusing on the recycling of aluminum and copper to produce ingots for export, further strengthening its global footprint.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Location: Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We seek to hire a qualified and technically competent Procurement Officer for our Aluminium and Copper Ingots Manufacturing Plant.
	The Factory, which is based in Mowe Lagos-Ibadan Express Way] Ogun state will primarily recycle a broad range of scrap materials and convert them to usable Aluminium and Copper Ingots for different manufacturing purposes.


Responsibilities
The ideal candidate will (but is not limited to):


	Source for suppliers of scraps and raw materials.
	Adhere to guidelines on how often the company gets price quotes for items, the number of bids to accept, and which vendors to consider.
	Procure goods for the company.
	Update supplier list/database regularly.
	Supplier relationship/engagements.
	Discuss contracts and possible engagements through the Manager.
	Evaluating quality, price, reliability, technical support, and availability of goods and services.
	Monitor scrap suppliers&rsquo; deliverables and timelines.
	Prepare and send out weekly/monthly reports.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Achieve at least 95% on-time delivery of scrap materials from suppliers.
	Maintain procurement cost savings of 5&ndash;10% through effective negotiation and sourcing.
	Ensure 98% supplier quality compliance on all aluminium and copper scrap deliveries.
	Maintain 100% adherence to procurement policies and reporting timelines.
	Keep procurement spend within &plusmn;5% of approved budget.
	Achieve 98% ERP data accuracy and timely update of supplier database.


Education and Experience


	A Degree in Supply Chain Management, Economics, Business Administration, Engineering, or a related field.
	2 - 4 years of experience in a purchasing or procurement role for a recycling facility.
	Aluminum Scraps procurement experience is required.


Required Competencies:


	Knowledge of procurement software and tools.
	Knowledge of Microsoft Dynamics or other ERPs.
	Interpersonal skills such as teamwork and good listening skills.
	Negotiation skills.
	Excellent communication skills.
	Ability to manage time and organize.
	Strong leadership skills
	Ability to multitask.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@neveah.com.ng using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the mail (E.g Procurement Officer- Ibadan).",

Procurement Officer Job at Neveah Limited




        
    

        
        Neveah Limited is a leading commodity trading company established in 2014, with its head office in Abuja and five operational offices across Nigeria. The company specializes in the export of solid minerals and agricultural products, sourcing the finest raw materials from local markets to meet international demand. Neveah has now expanded into manufacturing, focusing on the recycling of aluminum and copper to produce ingots for export, further strengthening its global footprint.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Location: Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We seek to hire a qualified and technically competent Procurement Officer for our Aluminium and Copper Ingots Manufacturing Plant.
	The Factory, which is based in Mowe Lagos-Ibadan Express Way] Ogun state will primarily recycle a broad range of scrap materials and convert them to usable Aluminium and Copper Ingots for different manufacturing purposes.


Responsibilities
The ideal candidate will (but is not limited to):


	Source for suppliers of scraps and raw materials.
	Adhere to guidelines on how often the company gets price quotes for items, the number of bids to accept, and which vendors to consider.
	Procure goods for the company.
	Update supplier list/database regularly.
	Supplier relationship/engagements.
	Discuss contracts and possible engagements through the Manager.
	Evaluating quality, price, reliability, technical support, and availability of goods and services.
	Monitor scrap suppliers’ deliverables and timelines.
	Prepare and send out weekly/monthly reports.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Achieve at least 95% on-time delivery of scrap materials from suppliers.
	Maintain procurement cost savings of 5–10% through effective negotiation and sourcing.
	Ensure 98% supplier quality compliance on all aluminium and copper scrap deliveries.
	Maintain 100% adherence to procurement policies and reporting timelines.
	Keep procurement spend within ±5% of approved budget.
	Achieve 98% ERP data accuracy and timely update of supplier database.


Education and Experience


	A Degree in Supply Chain Management, Economics, Business Administration, Engineering, or a related field.
	2 - 4 years of experience in a purchasing or procurement role for a recycling facility.
	Aluminum Scraps procurement experience is required.


Required Competencies:


	Knowledge of procurement software and tools.
	Knowledge of Microsoft Dynamics or other ERPs.
	Interpersonal skills such as teamwork and good listening skills.
	Negotiation skills.
	Excellent communication skills.
	Ability to manage time and organize.
	Strong leadership skills
	Ability to multitask.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the mail (E.g Procurement Officer- Ibadan).    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

title: Job Openings at High Caliber Nigeria Limited
content:
High Caliber Nigeria Limited is a human resources/management consultancy company. We specialize in the following areas: Outsourcing, Recruitment and Placement, Human Capacity Development (Training), Staff Audit, Advisory and Human Resources Management.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

1.) Waiter / Waitress

Job Location: Ikeja (GRA), Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a courteous and efficient Waitress to provide excellent customer service to guests.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for taking orders, serving food and beverages, and ensuring a pleasant dining experience.
	You should be attentive, friendly, and able to work in a fast-paced environment while maintaining high service standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Greet and welcome guests in a warm and professional manner
	Present menus and provide detailed information about food and beverage options
	Take accurate customer orders and relay them to the kitchen promptly
	Serve food and drinks efficiently and according to service standards
	Check on customers to ensure satisfaction and handle complaints where necessary
	Maintain cleanliness and organization of tables and dining areas
	Process bills and handle payments accurately
	Work collaboratively with kitchen and other service staff to ensure smooth operations


Requirements


	Proven experience as a waitress or in a similar customer service role is an advantage
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work under pressure in a fast-paced environment
	Strong attention to detail and customer-oriented approach
	Basic numeracy skills for handling bills and payments
	Neat appearance and professional demeanor
	Flexibility to work shifts, weekends, and public holidays


Preferred Qualities:


	Positive attitude and team spirit
	Ability to upsell menu items
	Good knowledge of food safety and hygiene practices.


Salary
N68,000 per month. 

Application Closing Date: 31st May, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "WAITER / WAITRESS IKEJA GRA" as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquiries, send via whatsapp to 08052275129.

 

 

2.) HR Generalist

Job Location: Amuwo Odofin, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The HR Generalist will be responsible for supporting day-to-day human resources operations, including recruitment, employee relations, payroll support, compliance, and performance management.
	The role requires hands-on experience in managing workforce dynamics typical of manufacturing or FMCG settings.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage end-to-end recruitment and onboarding processes.
	Maintain employee records and HR documentation.
	Handle employee relations issues, grievances, and disciplinary actions.
	Support payroll processing, attendance, and leave management.
	Assist in implementing performance appraisal systems.
	Ensure compliance with labor laws and company policies.
	Coordinate training and development programs.
	Support workplace health and safety initiatives in collaboration with HSE team.
	Prepare HR reports and maintain HR databases.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field.
	Strong knowledge of Nigerian labor laws and HR best practices.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and HR software systems.
	Excellent communication, organizational, and interpersonal skills.
	Note: Professional Certifications (would be an Added Advantage).
	Chartered Institute of Personnel Management of Nigeria (CIPM).


Salary
N350,000 per month. 

Application Closing Date: 11th June, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "HR Generalist"as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

 

3.) HR Compliance Manager

Job Location: Amuwo Odofin, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The HR Compliance Manager will be responsible for developing, implementing, and monitoring HR policies and procedures to ensure compliance with labor laws, company policies, and industry regulations.
	The ideal candidate must have strong knowledge of HR compliance frameworks within the Manufacturing or FMCG sector.


Key Responsibilities


	Ensure full compliance with local labor laws, statutory regulations, and company policies.
	Develop, review, and update HR policies, procedures, and employee handbook.
	Monitor compliance with health, safety, and environmental regulations in collaboration with relevant departments.
	Conduct internal audits and compliance checks on HR processes and documentation.
	Manage employee disciplinary processes in line with legal and company standards.
	Liaise with regulatory bodies and ensure timely submission of statutory reports.
	Provide guidance to management on HR compliance issues and risk mitigation.
	Oversee proper documentation of employee records, contracts, and HR data
	Investigate and resolve employee grievances and compliance-related issues.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree or HND in Human Resource Management, Business Administration, or related fields
	Strong knowledge of labor laws and regulatory requirements
	Professional HR certification (e.g., CIPM, SHRM, HRCI) is an added advantage
	Excellent analytical, organizational, and problem-solving skills
	Strong interpersonal and communication skills
	High level of integrity and attention to detail.


Salary
N350,000 per month.

Application Closing Date: 11th June, 2026. 

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "HR Compliance Manager"as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at La Campagne Tropicana Beach Resort
content:
La Campagne Tropicana Beach Resort - We are a premier beachfront resort located in Lagos, Nigeria, offering a unique blend of relaxation, cultural experience, and exceptional hospitality. Our resort provides luxury accommodation, recreational activities, and world-class service in a serene coastal environment.

We are committed to delivering memorable guest experiences through professionalism, teamwork, and high service standards. Our team consists of passionate and dedicated individuals who take pride in excellence, cleanliness, and customer satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Content Creator / Social Media Manager
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a creative and driven Content Creator / Social Media Manager to manage our online presence and drive engagement across platforms.
	You will create compelling content, oversee our social media channels, and help grow our brand.


Responsibilities


	Develop and implement social media campaigns tailored to each platform.
	Create original content including graphics, videos, and captions.
	Schedule posts, monitor engagement, and analyze performance metrics.
	Collaborate with marketing/design teams to maintain brand consistency.
	Stay updated on social media trends and apply innovative strategies to boost growth.


Requirements


	Proven experience in content creation and social media management.
	Strong storytelling and copywriting skills.
	Proficiency in Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, LinkedIn, Twitter/X.
	Knowledge of analytics tools and ability to optimize performance.
	Creative, detail-oriented, and proactive.


Bonus Skills:


	Video editing and graphic design (Canva, Photoshop, Premiere Pro, etc.).
	Experience with influencer partnerships and community engagement.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Portfolio to: [email protected] using “Application – Content Creator / Social Media Manager” as the subject of the mail.

 

 

2.) Horse Rider

Job Location: Eleko, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Ride and exercise horses regularly
	Train horses for racing, competitions, or recreational riding
	Monitor horse behavior, health, and fitness
	Groom, feed, and care for horses
	Clean and maintain saddles, bridles, and riding equipment
	Follow safety procedures while handling horses
	Assist with stable duties and horse transportation
	Participate in competitions, shows, or races when required
	Build trust and communication with horses during training.


Application Closing Date
Not Specified. 

How to Apply
Interested and qualified candidates should send their short introductory message to: [email protected] using the Job Title as the subject of the mail.

 

 

3.) Accountant

Job Location: Eleko, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilties


	Prepare and maintain financial records (ledgers, journals, statements)
	Analyze financial data and ensure accuracy
	Prepare financial reports (balance sheets, income statements, cash flow)
	Manage accounts payable and receivable
	Reconcile bank statements and financial discrepancies
	Ensure compliance with tax laws and regulations
	Prepare and file tax returns
	Assist with budgeting and financial planning
	Conduct internal audits and support external audits
	Monitor financial transactions and identify irregularities.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their a short introductory message along with an updated CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Specialist",
  "description": "Sustainable Procurement Services (SPS) Limited is a diversified and forward-thinking construction and infrastructure development company committed to delivering quality, innovation, and value-driven solutions across multiple sectors.

As a core construction firm, SPS Limited specializes in building and project delivery services, with a strong focus on excellence in execution, cost efficiency, and timely completion of projects. Over the years, the company has evolved beyond traditional construction into a multi-line business enterprise with eight (8) additional lines of business, strategically positioned to support its growth, operational strength, and market reach.

These diversified operations enable SPS Limited to offer integrated solutions across the construction value chain and related sectors, enhancing efficiency and creating added value for clients. The company&rsquo;s business structure reflects a strong commitment to innovation, sustainability, and expansion into complementary industries that support infrastructure development and economic growth.

At its core, SPS Limited is driven by professionalism, integrity, and excellence, with a workforce dedicated to delivering high standards in every project and business unit. Through its multi-sector approach, SPS continues to strengthen its reputation as a reliable and growing enterprise in the construction and allied services industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Specialist

Job Location: Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Social Media Specialist will be responsible for developing, implementing, and managing the organization&rsquo;s social media strategy to enhance brand awareness, improve marketing efforts, and increase engagement with target audience
	The role involves creating compelling content, monitoring social media platforms, analyzing performance metrics, and staying updated on industry trends.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute social media strategies aligned with business goals.
	Create, curate, and publish engaging content across various social media platforms (Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, X, TikTok, YouTube, etc.).
	Manage day-to-day activities on social media accounts, including scheduling posts and responding to comments/messages.
	Monitor social media trends, competitors, and audience engagement to identify opportunities for growth.
	Collaborate with internal teams such as marketing, design, and communications to create relevant campaigns and content.
	Plan and manage social media campaigns to increase brand visibility and audience engagement.
	Track, analyze, and report social media performance metrics and campaign effectiveness.
	Optimize content using SEO principles and social media best practices.
	Build and maintain online communities and customer relationships.
	Manage social media advertising and promotional campaigns where applicable.
	Stay informed on emerging digital tools, trends, and best practices.


Requirements/Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Marketing, Communications, Mass Communication, Public Relations, Digital Marketing, or related fields
	Proven experience as a Social Media Specialist, Digital Marketing Specialist, or similar role.
	Strong understanding of major social media platforms and analytics tools.
	Proficiency in content creation tools and social media management platforms.
	Knowledge of graphic design and video editing tools such as Canva, CapCut, Adobe Creative Suite, or similar applications is an added advantage.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Creative mindset with strong attention to detail.
	Strong analytical and organizational skills.


Salary

Social Media Specialist Job at Sustainable Procurement Services Limited




        
    

        
        Sustainable Procurement Services (SPS) Limited is a diversified and forward-thinking construction and infrastructure development company committed to delivering quality, innovation, and value-driven solutions across multiple sectors.

As a core construction firm, SPS Limited specializes in building and project delivery services, with a strong focus on excellence in execution, cost efficiency, and timely completion of projects. Over the years, the company has evolved beyond traditional construction into a multi-line business enterprise with eight (8) additional lines of business, strategically positioned to support its growth, operational strength, and market reach.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



These diversified operations enable SPS Limited to offer integrated solutions across the construction value chain and related sectors, enhancing efficiency and creating added value for clients. The company’s business structure reflects a strong commitment to innovation, sustainability, and expansion into complementary industries that support infrastructure development and economic growth.

At its core, SPS Limited is driven by professionalism, integrity, and excellence, with a workforce dedicated to delivering high standards in every project and business unit. Through its multi-sector approach, SPS continues to strengthen its reputation as a reliable and growing enterprise in the construction and allied services industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Specialist

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Social Media Specialist will be responsible for developing, implementing, and managing the organization’s social media strategy to enhance brand awareness, improve marketing efforts, and increase engagement with target audience
	The role involves creating compelling content, monitoring social media platforms, analyzing performance metrics, and staying updated on industry trends.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute social media strategies aligned with business goals.
	Create, curate, and publish engaging content across various social media platforms (Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, X, TikTok, YouTube, etc.).
	Manage day-to-day activities on social media accounts, including scheduling posts and responding to comments/messages.
	Monitor social media trends, competitors, and audience engagement to identify opportunities for growth.
	Collaborate with internal teams such as marketing, design, and communications to create relevant campaigns and content.
	Plan and manage social media campaigns to increase brand visibility and audience engagement.
	Track, analyze, and report social media performance metrics and campaign effectiveness.
	Optimize content using SEO principles and social media best practices.
	Build and maintain online communities and customer relationships.
	Manage social media advertising and promotional campaigns where applicable.
	Stay informed on emerging digital tools, trends, and best practices.


Requirements/Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Communications, Mass Communication, Public Relations, Digital Marketing, or related fields
	Proven experience as a Social Media Specialist, Digital Marketing Specialist, or similar role.
	Strong understanding of major social media platforms and analytics tools.
	Proficiency in content creation tools and social media management platforms.
	Knowledge of graphic design and video editing tools such as Canva, CapCut, Adobe Creative Suite, or similar applications is an added advantage.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Creative mindset with strong attention to detail.
	Strong analytical and organizational skills.


Salary
N150,000 - N180,000 monthly.

  "description": "Edazytech Integrated Services is a group of digital content provider and seasoned programmers whose passion and desire is to create business solutions, softwares for organizations, schools management software, Point of Sales applications, EMR system, etc. Edazytech focuses on reducing manual and paper works by introducing automated solutions tailor-made to suit peculiar needs. We are a team of professionals that cut accross every areas of website creation and development. We work closely with client to understand their needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Media Marketer

Job Location: Nigeria

Job Summary


	We are searching for a highly-creative Digital Marketer, to handle all aspects of our online marketing activities.
	It is a remote work, and while submitting your form indicate the state to handle your activities.


Job Description


	We are searching for a highly-creative Digital Marketer, to handle all aspects of our marketing operations, with the goal to help grow out brand influence both locally and internationally while also increasing brand loyalty and awareness
	The ideal candidate&#39;s duties will include planning, implementing, and monitoring our digital marketing campaigns across all digital networks
	Applicant must be experienced in social media management marketing.


Job Responsibilities


	Design and monitor all aspects of our digital marketing department including our marketing database and display advertising campaigns.
	Plan and manage our social media platforms.
	Develop and monitor our campaign budget.
	Coordinate with advertising and media experts to improve marketing results.
	Prepare accurate reports on our marketing campaign&#39;s overall performance.
	Evaluate important metrics that reflect progress relating to website traffic, service quotas, and target audience.
	Work with your team to develop new and innovative growth strategies.
	Identify the latest trends and technologies affecting our industry. (Stay up-to-date knowledge of technologies).
	Oversee and manage all contests, and other digital projects


Requirements


	In-depth knowledge of various social media platforms, best practices, and website analytics.
	Efficient written and verbal communication skills.
	Strong creative and analytical abilities.
	Social media inclination.
	A strong inclination towards teamwork and collaboration.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Application to: edazytechpaul@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Digital Media Marketer Job at Edazytech Integrated Services




        
    

        
        Edazytech Integrated Services is a group of digital content provider and seasoned programmers whose passion and desire is to create business solutions, softwares for organizations, schools management software, Point of Sales applications, EMR system, etc. Edazytech focuses on reducing manual and paper works by introducing automated solutions tailor-made to suit peculiar needs. We are a team of professionals that cut accross every areas of website creation and development. We work closely with client to understand their needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Media Marketer

Job Location: Nigeria

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are searching for a highly-creative Digital Marketer, to handle all aspects of our online marketing activities.
	It is a remote work, and while submitting your form indicate the state to handle your activities.


Job Description


	We are searching for a highly-creative Digital Marketer, to handle all aspects of our marketing operations, with the goal to help grow out brand influence both locally and internationally while also increasing brand loyalty and awareness
	The ideal candidate's duties will include planning, implementing, and monitoring our digital marketing campaigns across all digital networks
	Applicant must be experienced in social media management marketing.


Job Responsibilities


	Design and monitor all aspects of our digital marketing department including our marketing database and display advertising campaigns.
	Plan and manage our social media platforms.
	Develop and monitor our campaign budget.
	Coordinate with advertising and media experts to improve marketing results.
	Prepare accurate reports on our marketing campaign's overall performance.
	Evaluate important metrics that reflect progress relating to website traffic, service quotas, and target audience.
	Work with your team to develop new and innovative growth strategies.
	Identify the latest trends and technologies affecting our industry. (Stay up-to-date knowledge of technologies).
	Oversee and manage all contests, and other digital projects


Requirements


	In-depth knowledge of various social media platforms, best practices, and website analytics.
	Efficient written and verbal communication skills.
	Strong creative and analytical abilities.
	Social media inclination.
	A strong inclination towards teamwork and collaboration.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Application to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
